texto: Let me wake up next to you,A cup of coffee together will do.Let’s go out somewhere far,Don’t let anyone know till we’re back.Grab your bike keys & my hand,Let’s wander holding hand in hand.To our secret spot up the hill we go,And we see the sunset & more.Under a magical sky filled with stars,Kiss me good night on my eyes.And we find out you don't have to be happy at all...Cause darling, I'm beside you holding your hand
explicacao: Orientação direta de Deepa Borkar sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “Let me wake up next to you,A cup of coffee together will do.Let’s go out somewhere far,Don’t let …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a amor, biker-romance, coffee, útil em momentos de boa-noite e reflexao-noturna.
